Localization.Description: A job in cron job scheduler was created or changed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User with ID {subject.account.id} changed job {object.name} using the process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
User with ID {subject.account.id} created job {object.name} using the process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} created job {object.name} using the process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} changed job {object.name} using the process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
